calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Continued To Jul-07-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to the hearing counsel appeared clarifying the TR. The clerk emails counsel the entire TR and follows up on a proposed order which is verbatim.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KIMBERLY VIDAL MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Before the court is an unopposed Motion to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel Jerry Wang and Huron Legal Group, PC, counsel of record for Defendant Kimberly B. Vidal. The motion is OFF CALENDAR.

(see word minutes for full details)

Prior to the hearing, Moving Counsel shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order repeating the above verbatim. The court notes that it directed an identical order regarding submission of a proposed order to counsel Huron Legal Group, PC just last week and counsel Huron Legal Group, PC is in violation of that order. (See JPMorgan Chase Bank v. Bahl, CGC-25-628144.) Violations of court orders are unacceptable.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Continued To Apr-07-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to April 07, 2026, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-30-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Set For Trial On Oct-27-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
